message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor ScooterOwner
boundary Dashboard
control BikeService
control ClaimsService
entity bike
entity Claim

ScooterOwner -> Dashboard : lockBike
activate Dashboard
Dashboard -> BikeService : lockBike(bike)
activate BikeService
BikeService -> ClaimsService : lockBike(bike)
activate ClaimsService
ClaimsService --> BikeService : bike
deactivate ClaimsService
BikeService --> Dashboard : bike
deactivate BikeService
Dashboard --> ScooterOwner : bike
deactivate Dashboard

ScooterOwner -> Dashboard : unlockBike
activate Dashboard
Dashboard -> BikeService : unlockBike(bike)
activate BikeService
BikeService -> ClaimsService : unlockBike(bike)
activate ClaimsService
ClaimsService --> BikeService : bike
deactivate ClaimsService
BikeService --> Dashboard : bike
deactivate BikeService
Dashboard --> ScooterOwner : bike
deactivate Dashboard

@enduml
```
